# growthbook_sdk_connection (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook SDK connection by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "growthbook_sdk_connection" "web_prod" {
  id = "sdk-abc123"
}

output "sdk_client_key" {
  value = data.growthbook_sdk_connection.web_prod.key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) SDK connection ID.

### Read-Only

- `environment` (String) Environment served.
- `key` (String) Client key used by SDKs.
- `languages` (List of String) Languages associated with the connection.
- `name` (String) Connection name.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs the connection is scoped to.
- `proxy_host` (String) Proxy host URL, if any.
- `sse_enabled` (Boolean) Whether SSE streaming is enabled.
